# sample-app

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Shared fake-app vignette ('Project Aurora') built from real UI primitives, reused by the site demos (theme toy, release switcher). No contributions — a pure component library plugin.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/card.Card`, `primitives/css/cluster.Cluster`, `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/surface.Surface`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`
  - Exports: Values: `SampleVignette`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/website/demos/release-switcher`, `apps/website/demos/theme-toy`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
